name: io.github.dewijones92/sonarqube-csharp-mcp
description: Analyze C# code with SonarAnalyzer.CSharp against your project's live SonarQube/SonarCloud quality profile. Complements the official SonarQube MCP server, which cannot analyze C#.

environmentVariables.description: Your SonarQube Cloud organization key (required for SonarCloud; omit for SonarQube Server)
environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_ORG

environmentVariables.description: Your SonarQube Server URL (defaults to https://sonarcloud.io)
environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Default project key whose C# quality profile is used
environmentVariables.name: SONARQUBE_PROJECT_KEY
